The problem

Most expansion
decisions are guesses.

Pick a city. Trust the gut. Open the store.
Hope for the best.

SmartMarket replaces guesswork with geography — turning location data into measurable, defensible decisions.
where will customers come from?
is the catchment dense enough?
will competitors arrive first?
how much will it actually earn?
are we cannibalizing ourselves?

Five workflows. One platform.

From a single grid,
every location decision.

01
New Site
Selection
Find the next store before you sign the lease. Demographics, demand, competition — every signal that matters, on one grid.
02
Geo-
marketing
Target consumers where they actually are. Match brand to neighborhood — block by block, postcode by postcode.
03
Market
Analysis
Size every micromarket. Compare opportunities across cities, districts, or 150m grids — with the same defensible methodology.
04
Territory
Planning
Design distribution networks that work. Find whitespace, optimize beats, balance sales territories.
05
Risk
Analysis
Underwrite locations against hazards, demand risk, regulatory exposure. Decide what to back — and what to avoid.
SmartMarket in action · Use Case 01
07 / 12
01 New Site Selection

Open every store
in exactly the
right place.

100+ datasets, unified. Real-time consumer movement. A weighted scoring model that ranks every grid by ROI potential.

  • 100+ datasets unified — footfall, affluence, mobility, traffic.
  • Real-time consumer signals — demographics and movement updated continuously.
  • Weighted scoring — balance demand, affluence, competition, adjacency.
  • Data-backed shortlist — confidence in every greenlight, no more guesswork.
Used by Samsung · IKEA · Cashify · Ather
Approach
Site Selection
1

City Selection

Start with a target market — city, pin-code, or locality.

2

Micro-Grid Breakdown

Divide the city into 150m × 150m grids for granular analysis.

3

Data Enrichment

Layer demographics, income, traffic, and competitor footprint onto every grid.

4

Weightage Scoring

Apply your weights — footfall, affluence, competition, infra, adjacency.

5

Best-Site Recommendations

Top grids ranked by ROI potential, surfaced on a dashboard.

Outcome A data-backed shortlist of best-fit sites — every outlet placed for sustained profitability.
